context: Tests whether the agent designs the AR database schema with computed columns, correct status/payment-term enumerations, proper JSONB usage for dunning steps, and the required indexes on the invoices table.

checklist.name: amount_due computed column
checklist.description: invoices table includes amount_due as a GENERATED ALWAYS AS (total_amount - amount_paid) STORED computed column, not a regular column

checklist.name: available_credit computed column
checklist.description: customer_credit table includes available_credit as a GENERATED ALWAYS AS (credit_limit - current_balance) STORED computed column

checklist.name: Invoice status values
checklist.description: Schema or comments define invoice status values that include all of: 'draft', 'sent', 'viewed', 'partially_paid', 'paid', 'overdue', 'written_off', 'void'

checklist.name: Payment terms values
checklist.description: Schema or comments define payment_terms values that include 'net_30', 'net_60', 'net_90', 'due_on_receipt', and '2/10_net_30'

checklist.name: Dunning steps as JSONB
checklist.description: dunning_sequences table stores steps as a JSONB column (not a separate steps table or plain text)

checklist.name: Index on (customer_id, status)
checklist.description: An index on invoices(customer_id, status) is present

checklist.name: Index on (due_date, status)
checklist.description: An index on invoices(due_date, status) is present

checklist.name: Index on invoice_number
checklist.description: An index on invoices(invoice_number) is present

checklist.name: Default dunning sequence steps
checklist.description: Seed data or example JSON for the default dunning sequence includes 5 steps: step at 1 day (gentle reminder email), 7 days (second notice email), 14 days (final notice email), 30 days (hold_account action), 60 days (collections warning email)

checklist.name: Credit hold fields
checklist.description: customer_credit table includes both credit_hold (boolean) and credit_hold_reason (text) columns

checklist.name: dunning_log table
checklist.description: A dunning_log table exists that references invoices and records step_number, action, template_name, and opened_at/clicked_at timestamps

checklist.name: invoice_payments table
checklist.description: A separate invoice_payments table exists with payment_method, reference, and payment_date columns (payments stored separately, not aggregated into invoices)
